Thank you for contributing to the Cardano Demo Wallet Dashboard. Please fill out the sections below to help us review your PR.

## Description

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What is the purpose of this change?

## Related Issue

If this PR fixes or relates to an issue, reference it here.  
Example: `Fixes #123`, `Related to #45`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (code structure or readability, no behavior change)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Changes Made

Describe what you changed: files touched, logic updated, new dependencies (if any).

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style and existing patterns.
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and it succeeds.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I have checked for merge conflicts with the base branch.
